data.content:
This is an **NUnit** project on **VSTest**. Use the `--filter` option with `FullyQualifiedName`:

```
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ReportExporterTests"
```

The `~` operator means "contains", so this matches all tests in `ReportExporterTests` while excluding `ReportGeneratorTests`.
data.reasoningText: This is an NUnit project using VSTest (NUnit3TestAdapter). The user wants to filter by class name.
